samples.xml_description: Accumulate input data and output after 4 inputs. Clock. Active-low reset. Input data. Input valid signal. Output valid signal. Output data. 0 1 2 State. Next state. Counter. Next counter. Sum. Next sum. Next valid out. Always accumulate four input data and output the result in the next cycle. The valid_out signal is set to 1 when the data_out outputs 4 received data accumulation results. Otherwise, it is set to 0.
